name: Flow / Gemini Agent Mode
structureNotes: Generate reference assets first, upload them into one Flow project, tag them with @ names, then create clips conversationally.

name: Flow + fallback prompts
structureNotes: Main workflow for Flow / Gemini Agent Mode, plus Seedance-style prompts if Jenn needs another tool.

name: Fallback prompts only
structureNotes: Still creates the Flow setup pack, but keeps the clip output focused on Seedance-style structured prompts.
